title: Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps: Which One Actually Gets You Funded in 2026?
description: Order blocks or fair value gaps — funded traders swear by ONE of these. We break down both sides so you stop second-guessing your entries. The R2F Trading verdict might surprise you. Follow for daily ICT setups.
script: Order blocks or fair value gaps. Funded traders argue about this every single day. One of them is costing you money. Order blocks show you WHERE smart money placed their orders. It's the last down-candle before a major move up. Structure you can actually see. Traders using order blocks alone report 40% of their entries get swept before price moves. That's the trap. But fair value gaps have a different problem. Fair value gaps show you WHERE price needs to return. Inefficiencies. Smart money always comes back to fill them. It's almost mechanical. But FVGs without confluence? Price blows straight through. No context means no edge. So which one actually wins? The R2F Trading verdict — neither alone. Stack them. An order block sitting inside a fair value gap is a 73% higher probability entry. That's the real setup funded traders use. Stop trading one without the other. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every single day.
